name: CH32V407VET6
description: Generated from the WCH CH32V407 parser pipeline for CH32V407VET6 LQFP100. Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 2-1 CH32V407 and CH32V467 pin definitions. CH32V407VET6 is a CH32V407 MCU in a 100-pin LQFP100 package. This generated definition includes 40 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 16 input channels, CAN, 10M Ethernet, 1 I2C bus, 1 op-amp, USB full-speed, 3 SPI buses, and 10 serial ports.
